tasks.subject: Task 0: Add den flake input and bootstrap module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire den into the flake via flake-file dendritic import.

**Files:**
- Modify: modules/flake-parts/devtools/flake-file.nix
- Create: modules/den/systems.nix

**Verify:** nix-flake-build cortex

tasks.subject: Task 1: Define den defaults and custom forwarding classes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Set up global den defaults, ctx includes, and homeLinux/homeDarwin forwarding classes.

**Files:**
- Create: modules/den/defaults.nix
- Create: modules/den/classes/home-platform.nix

**Verify:** nix-flake-build cortex

acceptanceCriteria: hostname and define-user in global ctx

tasks.subject: Task 2: Define home-manager integration aspect
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Configure home-manager defaults for den hosts.

**Files:**
- Create: modules/den/home-manager.nix

**Verify:** nix-flake-build cortex

tasks.subject: Task 3: Migrate first aspect (shell/zsh)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Migrate zsh feature to den aspect as proof of concept.

**Files:**
- Create: modules/den/aspects/shell/zsh.nix
- Reference: modules/features/login/zsh.nix, modules/apps/shell/zsh.nix, modules/core/shell/zsh.nix

**Verify:** nix-flake-build cortex

tasks.subject: Task 4: Define first den host (cortex-den) and user (sini)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Declare cortex-den as a den host with user sini, producing nixosConfigurations.cortex-den.

**Files:**
- Create: modules/den/hosts/cortex-den.nix
- Create: modules/den/users/sini.nix

**Verify:** nix eval .#nixosConfigurations.cortex-den.config.system.nixos.version

tasks.subject: Task 5: Migrate audio/pipewire aspect with providers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Migrate audio feature to demonstrate provider pattern.

**Files:**
- Create: modules/den/aspects/audio/pipewire.nix
- Reference: modules/features/hardware/audio.nix

**Verify:** nix-flake-build cortex

tasks.subject: Task 6: Add hardware config for cortex-den build
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make cortex-den use real hardware config. Create no-op stubs for unmigrated features.

**Files:**
- Modify: modules/den/hosts/cortex-den.nix
- Create: modules/den/aspects/stubs.nix

**Verify:** nix-flake-build cortex-den

tasks.subject: Task 7: Commit and document progress
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Commit all work with clear messages.

**Verify:** git status → clean working tree
